title: Microeconomics — Midterm Review
description: Flagship micro: supply/demand, elasticity, surplus, costs & profit.

blocks.title: Shifts vs moves
blocks.markdown:
| Change | Curve | Along curve |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| Income, tastes, # buyers | Demand shift | — |
| Input costs, tech, # sellers | Supply shift | — |
| Price change only | — | Movement |

blocks.title: Shock analysis
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Identify shock] --> B{Demand or supply?}
  B -->|Demand| C[Shift D]
  B -->|Supply| D[Shift S]
  C --> E[New eq P*, Q*]
  D --> E
  E --> F[Surplus / shortage transition]

blocks.title: Revenue & elasticity
blocks.markdown:
| |ε| | Demand | Price ↑ → TR |
|------|--------|-------------|
| > 1 | Elastic | Falls |
| = 1 | Unit | Unchanged |
| < 1 | Inelastic | Rises |

blocks.title: Cost terms
blocks.markdown:
| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|--------|
| FC, VC | Fixed / variable cost |
| ATC, AVC | Average total / variable |
| MC | Marginal cost |
| MR | Marginal revenue |

blocks.title: Exam checklist
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Graph or algebra?] --> B[Label axes & curves]
  B --> C[Find eq / elasticity / surplus]
  C --> D[Direction of shift]
  D --> E[Welfare / policy note]
